user.title: Solar Irrigation — Location & Setup
user.description: Location defaults to your HA home. Buildings and zone geometry are drawn later in the Lovelace card.

data.name: Installation name
data.north_offset: North offset (°, 0 = Y axis points North)
data.mm_per_min: Default flow rate (mm/min) — applies to all zones

zone.title: Solar Irrigation — Zone {zone_index} of {total_zones}

data.name: Zone name
data.kc_custom: Custom Kc value (used only if 'Custom' is selected above)

et0.title: Solar Irrigation — ET0 Source
et0.description: ET0 is the daily reference evapotranspiration. Use 'Fixed' for a simple setup, 'Weather' to auto-calculate from your weather entity.

data.et0_entity: Weather or ET0 sensor entity ID

data.irradiance_weighted: Weight shadow by solar irradiance (sin²·⁵ elevation) — more accurate
data.use_dst: Apply DST correction (UTC+2, Apr–Oct for Italy/CET)

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON — please check the syntax.

init.title: Solar Irrigation — Settings
init.description: Zones and buildings can be edited as JSON below for advanced users.
